title: PoW replay: DashMap::entry() for atomic check-and-insert eliminates TOCTOU
description: The PoW replay set uses DashMap::entry() which holds a shard lock for the entire check+insert, eliminating the TOCTOU between contains_key() and insert(). A contributor might suggest replacing this with a separate contains_key/insert pair for 'readability' — resist: that reintroduces the race where two connections with the same token both pass the contains_key check before either inserts.
